new_classes.label_en: aerated water (other than natural mineral water)
new_classes.definition_en: Water artificially charged with carbon dioxide that is not natural mineral water complying with Directive 2009/54/EC, and not presented in aerosol containers for skin care. Corresponds to CN subheading 2201 10 90.

coverage_explanation: The proposed axioms capture the three main discriminating criteria from the legal note: (1) the product is a carbonated/aerated water (someValuesFrom CarbonationQuality); (2) it is NOT natural mineral water complying with Directive 2009/54/EC (complement of Directive200954ECCompliance quality); (3) it is NOT presented in aerosol containers for skin-care use (complement of SkinCareAerosolPresentation quality). The reference to HS Explanatory Note paragraphs (B) and (C) describes the broader mineral/aerated water group (22011011–22011090) rather than being specific to this residual subheading, so it cannot be further formalised without additional external text. Coverage is therefore 0.85 rather than 1.0 because the precise boundary between 22011011 (natural mineral water, non-carbonated) and 22011090 (other aerated waters) within the group relies on the external HS Explanatory Note content not reproduced here.
